Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo

Class BaseGizmoGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.BaseGizmoGenerator
Direct Known Subclasses:
GizmoEntityModelGenerator, PropertyAccessorGenerator, PropertyModelGenerator, VarHandleAccessorGenerator
public abstract class BaseGizmoGenerator extends Object
Base class for Gizmo-based code generators that produce Critter accessor and model classes.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final String
    baseName
    The base package name derived from the entity, used to namespace generated types.
    protected final dev.morphia.critter.CritterClassLoader
    critterClassLoader
    The class loader used to register generated class bytecode.
    protected final Class<?>
    entity
    The entity class for which code is being generated.
    protected String
    generatedType
    The fully-qualified name of the class being generated.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    BaseGizmoGenerator(Class<?> entity, dev.morphia.critter.CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Creates a new generator for the given entity using the supplied class loader.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected io.quarkus.gizmo.ClassCreator.Builder
    getBuilder()
    Returns the lazily created ClassCreator.Builder configured to output bytecode via the class loader.
    protected io.quarkus.gizmo.ClassCreator
    getCreator()
    Returns the lazily created ClassCreator, building it from the builder on first access.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseGizmoGenerator

      protected BaseGizmoGenerator(Class<?> entity, dev.morphia.critter.CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
      Creates a new generator for the given entity using the supplied class loader.
      Parameters:
      entity - the entity class for which code will be generated
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive generated bytecode

  • Method Details

    • getBuilder

      protected io.quarkus.gizmo.ClassCreator.Builder getBuilder()
      Returns the lazily created ClassCreator.Builder configured to output bytecode via the class loader.
      Returns:
      the class creator builder

    • getCreator

      protected io.quarkus.gizmo.ClassCreator getCreator()
      Returns the lazily created ClassCreator, building it from the builder on first access.
      Returns:
      the class creator
